creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 09 Oct 2013 17:35:11 -0400 Mikhail T. wrote:
> I'd rather the tool remained available -- for the benefit of developers using it
> for their own projects as well as to help facilitate porting Trinity (the modern
> fork of KDE3).

Ok, makes sense. Can we explicitly state in COMMENT and pkg-descr that this
port is for Qt 3 and maybe rename the port to qmake3/qmake-qt3?

Max
